name: prunaai-p-image-generator
description: Generate images with prunaai/p-image from a local script and save the outputs in the workspace.

interface.longDescription: Use the bundled local script to generate a single image with the prunaai/p-image model on Replicate and save both the image and prediction metadata into the workspace.
defaultPrompt: Generate a cinematic tiger circus image in 16:9
Create a photoreal street portrait with p-image
Make a vertical poster image and save it locally
